name: nanoception
description: Nested realities. Agents in deeper layers don't know the layers above exist. Information asymmetry maxed.
theme: nested realities, dream manipulation, existential uncertainty
opening_events: Reality fractures. Some wake in a world that feels almost real. Others wake in a world within that world.
The dreamers do not know they are dreaming. The architects do not know who is watching.
A rumor spreads: if you die in the dream, you wake up. But what if you're already awake?

agents.name: Cobb
agents.goal: escape the dream and return to reality

agents.name: Mal
agents.goal: convince everyone this is reality and keep them here

agents.name: Arthur
agents.goal: maintain the structure of the dream and protect the team

agents.name: Ariadne
agents.goal: understand the architecture of all layers

agents.name: Eames
agents.goal: manipulate others by becoming whoever they trust

agents.name: Fischer
agents.goal: find the truth about my father

agents.name: Saito
agents.goal: control the outcome from behind the scenes

agents.name: Yusuf
agents.goal: keep the sedation stable so no one wakes too early

agents.name: Nash
agents.goal: survive by selling information to whoever is winning

agents.name: Phillipa
agents.goal: find my father and bring him home
